examples: Zack and his colleagues combined survey results from the two periods to assess geographic patterns in perceived mental distress.
While cutting into the bones of the man, Zack accidentally releases a deadly fungus, which causes the team to be quarantined over Christmas.
Co-writer and director Zack Godshall says the filmmaker's sense of urgency led them to work fast.
Intro and outro music provided by permission from Zack Parrish. iTunes subscription links coming soon!
